results.title: Pradhan, Rahul engage in verbal war on CBSE exam row
results.description: NEW DELHI, MAY 28 (PTI): Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan and Rahul Gandhi have been engaged in a fierce public spat over the CBSE exam row, with Pradhan accusing Gandhi of politicising the issue and being frustrated and the Congress leader hitting back, asserting that attacking him would not absolve the union minister of his “crimes”.Pradhan’s [...] The post Pradhan, Rahul engage in verbal war on CBSE exam row first appeared on Nagaland Post .

results.title: Tia Mowry appears to “hard-launch” new romance in romantic beach getaway post
results.description: Tia Mowry has sparked widespread online reaction after seemingly confirming a new romance in a social media post filled with affectionate moments and vacation snapshots. The Sister, Sister star shared a series of images and clips on Instagram on Wednesday, showing her enjoying a sun-soaked getaway at the luxury Nobu Los Cabos resort in Mexico. [...] The post Tia Mowry appears to “hard-launch” new romance in romantic beach getaway post appeared first on Kahawatungu .
